---
title: "blog"
listing:
  contents: blog
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
---

```{=html}
<style>
.category-tagline {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #888;
  margin-top: 2px;
  font-style: italic;
  line-height: 1.3;
}
.quarto-listing-category .category {
  padding-bottom: 4px;
}
</style>
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  var taglines = {
    "MASLD & Liver Disease": "awareness",
    "Immunology & The Lab": "nerds only. you have been warned",
    "Computational Corner": "single-cell · multiomics · tools",
    "Postdoc Diaries": "personal · international researcher"
  };
  document.querySelectorAll(".quarto-listing-category .category").forEach(function (el) {
    var cat = el.getAttribute("data-category");
    if (taglines[cat]) {
      var tag = document.createElement("div");
      tag.className = "category-tagline";
      tag.textContent = taglines[cat];
      el.appendChild(tag);
    }
  });
});
</script>
```
